title: In The Forest
content:
آ آ آ آ List to the forest-voice murmuring low:
آ آ آ آ All that it saw when alone with its laughter,
آ آ آ آ All that it suffered in times that came after,
آ آ آ آ Mournful it tells, that the wind may know.
meaning:

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
